# data/

This directory is gitignored. You need to populate it before running the analysis scripts.

## Required input

Download the GEO namespace archive from PEPhub:
<https://pephub.databio.org/geo?view=archive>

Place the tar file here as `data/geo_2024_10_01.tar`. Alternatively, `preprocessing/01_download_archive.R` can download a newer snapshot for you.

Then run `preprocessing/02_parse_peps.R` to extract and parse the archive into `geo_metadata.parquet` (~229K projects).

## Generated files

Scripts will populate this directory with intermediate files:

| File | Generated by | Used by |
|------|-------------|---------|
| `geo_metadata.parquet` | `preprocessing/02_parse_peps.R` | Both issues |
| `peps/` | `preprocessing/02_parse_peps.R` | Extracted PEP zips |
| `geo_text_for_embedding.parquet` | `issue55/.../04_text_preprocessing.py` | Issue 55 |
| `geo_embeddings.parquet` | `issue55/.../05_generate_embeddings.py` | Issue 55 |
| `column_frequencies.parquet` | `issue65/.../03_column_frequency.py` | Issue 65 |
| `column_classifications.parquet` | `issue65/.../04_standard_vs_user.py` | Issue 65 |
| `user_defined_columns.parquet` | `issue65/.../04_standard_vs_user.py` | Issue 65 |
| `column_synonyms.json` | `issue65/.../05_synonym_clustering.py` | Issue 65 |
| `column_synonyms_full.json` | `issue65/.../05_synonym_clustering.py` | Issue 65 |
| `schema_mapping_benchmark.json` | `issue65/.../07_benchmark_dataset.py` | Issue 65 |
| `schema_mapping_benchmark_annotated.json` | `issue65/.../07_benchmark_dataset.py` | Issue 65 |
